module.name: index
module.description: Plugin entry point that assembles all rule implementations, flat config presets, and legacy config presets into the published @coderrob/eslint-plugin-zero-tolerance package.

scenarios.name: should expose a meta object containing the package name and version
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported
scenarios.then: contains a name equal to the package name and a version string

scenarios.name: should register all plugin rules keyed by their unprefixed names
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported
scenarios.then: contains every rule name defined in the plugin

scenarios.name: should register require-jsdoc-anonymous-functions as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register require-barrel-relative-exports as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register require-clean-barrel as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-destructured-parameter-type-literal as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-parent-internal-access as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-barrel-parent-imports as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register require-exported-object-type as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-literal-property-unions as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-explicit-any as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-map-set-mutation as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-math-random as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register no-process-env-outside-config as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register prefer-structured-clone as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should register require-exhaustive-switch as a standalone rule
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported

scenarios.name: should expose a recommended flat config preset
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported
scenarios.then: returns an ESLint flat config object with name, plugins, and rules

scenarios.name: should expose a strict flat config preset
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported
scenarios.then: returns an ESLint flat config object with name, plugins, and rules set to error severity

scenarios.name: should expose a legacy recommended config preset
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported
scenarios.then: returns a legacy ESLint config object with parser and rules

scenarios.name: should expose a legacy strict config preset
scenarios.given: the plugin default export is imported
scenarios.then: returns a legacy ESLint config object with parser and rules set to error severity
